1: And hast not made my foes to rejoice over me.
2: I cried unto thee, and thou hast healed me.
3: Thou hast kept me alive, that I should not go down to the pit.
4: And give thanks at the remembrance of his holiness.
5: Weeping may endure for a night, but joy cometh cometh in the morning.
6: And in my prosperity I said, I shall never be moved.
7: Thou didst hide thy face, and and I was troubled.
8: And unto the LORD LORD I made supplication.
10: LORD LORD , be thou my helper.
11: Thou hast put off my sackcloth, and girded me with gladness;
12: O LORD LORD my God, I will give thanks unto thee for ever.
